title: The Dual Impact of Emerging Technologies on Green IT
description: A flowchart illustrating how emerging technologies both challenge and enable Green IT goals, highlighting their environmental impact and potential for sustainability solutions.
relationships: Cloud Computing increases Energy Consumption but enables Resource Efficiency
IoT enables Monitoring & Optimization but generates E-Waste
AI optimizes Energy Consumption but has a high Carbon Footprint
Blockchain enables Circular Economy but is energy-intensive
5G Networks increase Energy Consumption but enable efficient Monitoring
Edge Computing reduces Carbon Footprint by processing data locally
